name: Humane World for Animals Australia
summary: Animal protection organisation working on wildlife conservation, animal welfare and ending exploitation in trade and industry.
description: Relevant for wildlife policy, trade reform, farmed-animal welfare, conservation and national campaign coalitions.
alignment: Listed because its policy and protection work overlaps with Bite Back campaigns across wildlife, law and welfare.
